_comment: Spectri Hooks Manifest - Source of truth for hook definitions deployed to agent settings

_schema_docs._note: This schema documents all fields. Run 'jq ._schema_docs' to view without data.
_schema_docs.schema_version: Manifest schema version for compatibility checking (semver format)
_schema_docs.hooks: Array of hook definitions to deploy into agent settings files
_schema_docs.hooks[].id: Unique identifier (kebab-case) for the hook definition
_schema_docs.hooks[].description: Brief description of what this hook does
_schema_docs.hooks[].event: Claude Code hook event: PreToolUse | PostToolUse | SessionStart | SubagentStart | PostCompact | UserPromptSubmit
_schema_docs.hooks[].matcher: Tool matcher for PreToolUse/PostToolUse events (null for session/prompt events)
_schema_docs.hooks[].timeout: Timeout in seconds for the hook command
_schema_docs.hooks[].agents: Array of agent IDs this hook applies to (e.g. ['claude'])

hooks.description: Prevents direct writes to deployed Spectri artifacts
Guards spec folder structure on Write operations
Prevents direct edits to deployed Spectri artifacts
Guards spec folder structure on Edit operations
Monitors spec folder changes after Write operations
Monitors spec folder changes after Edit operations
Injects using-spectri skill content at session start
Injects using-spectri skill content at subagent start
Re-injects using-spectri skill content after context compaction
Injects skill-check reinforcement on every user prompt
Blocks Bash commands that write to spectri/ artifact directories
Advisory check for missing implementation summary or spec update before completion
Advisory post-commit check for missing bundle elements
